overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a brown leather jacket walking through a wet downtown city street at night. The scene features reflective wet pavement, yellow taxis, illuminated skyscrapers, and urban street furniture including mailboxes and bus shelters.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with construction barriers and mailboxes

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily along the wet sidewalk passing blue and yellow mailboxes and wooden construction barriers

entered.detail: orange and white striped wooden construction fence running along the right side of the sidewalk
dark blue postal service mailbox on the sidewalk corner
bright yellow postal service mailbox next to the blue mailbox
classical stone building with columns and arched windows on the right side
yellow taxi cab driving on the wet street with headlights on
traffic sign pole with no parking restrictions mounted on it

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet city sidewalk at night, passing wooden construction barriers on the right and mailboxes on the left. Yellow taxis drive by on the street as the character moves past a stone building facade, with street lamps casting reflections on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with bus shelter and building mural

agents.ego_description: character continues walking past a glass and metal bus shelter and a building featuring a large black and white mural

entered.detail: glass and metal bus stop shelter with bench and advertisement poster inside
large black and white portrait mural painted on the brick building wall
concrete steps leading up to a building entrance on the right side
metal chain link fence running along the building property line

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a glass bus shelter on the left and a building with a striking black and white portrait mural on the right. The sidewalk continues past concrete stairs and chain link fencing as the character approaches the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with wet crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: character stops at the intersection corner waiting for a yellow taxi to pass before crossing
character begins crossing the wet street at the crosswalk after traffic clears

agents.ego_description: character waits at the intersection corner then crosses the wet street, navigating between passing taxis

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi drives through the intersection from left to right, splashing through wet pavement

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing lines on the wet asphalt street
traffic signal pole with illuminated walk signal showing green pedestrian icon
multi-story brick building with metal fire escape stairs visible on the facade
black newspaper vending box on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a wide urban intersection, stopping at the corner to wait for a yellow taxi to pass. After the traffic clears, the character steps onto the wet crosswalk and begins crossing the street, with a brick building featuring fire escapes visible across the road and traffic lights showing the green walk signal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked city sidewalk that eventually leads the character across a wide urban intersection. It begins with the character walking past wooden construction barriers and mailboxes, while yellow taxis glide by on pavement reflecting the glow of street lamps. As the character continues forward, the scene shifts past a glass bus shelter and a building adorned with a large black and white portrait mural, moving alongside concrete stairs and chain link fencing. The camera then follows the character to the edge of a busy crossing, where they pause for passing traffic before stepping onto the wet crosswalk. Finally, the movement concludes as the character crosses toward a brick building with fire escapes under the glow of a green walk signal.
